title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while out and about with Satono
Diamond...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow Satono Diamond's gaze to a claw machine
filled with Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
There's no mistake. It's the latest arcade cabinet
from our affiliate company!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I heard it would be launching soon, and it looks
like it finally has.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! Would you mind trying it out for
me?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I've been following its development, so I can't
wait to see it in action!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
How about this? If you win a lot of plushies, I'll,
um... give you a special prize!
choice_data_list: Sure, I'll give it a shot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
